response: Start by reading nutrition labels to identify hidden sugars in your favorite [snack]. Replace sugary drinks with water or herbal tea from your local [store]. Focus on eating whole fruits instead of processed sweets to satisfy cravings naturally. Gradually reduce the amount of added sugar in your recipes over time. Plan your meals ahead to avoid impulsive choices when you are hungry. Keep healthy alternatives like nuts or yogurt readily available in your kitchen. Consistency is key to successfully breaking your sugar habit.
